LAW AND MOTION 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS CLARIFIED BY BOTH COUNSELS. PLAINTIFFS RICHARD G. PAREJO AND BARBARA PAREJO AS TRUSTEES OF THE PAREJO FAMILY LIVING TRUST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION SHOULD BE FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT SINCE THERE ARE ONLY 2 CAUSES OF ACTION WHICH WERE RESOLVED. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS SATISFIED THEIR BURDEN OF PRODUCTION THAT DEFENDANTS BREACHED PROMISSORY NOTE AND BONUS AGREEMENT DEFENDANTS FAILED TO PRESENT EVIDENCE SHOWING A TRIABLE ISSUE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Discharged

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Determine Prevailing Party And For Award Of Reasonable Attornesy Fees
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eric McFarland, Esq. of Thompson Welch, Tel. 415.450.0295, appearing for plaintiff and moving party.

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS RICHARD G. PAREJO and BARBARA J PAREJO, AS TRUSTEES OF THE PAREJO FAMILY TRUST'S Motion For Order To Determine Prevailing Party And For Award Of Reasonable Attornesy Fees is Granted in part. Plaintiffs are awarded attorney's fees of $35,000. The fees incurred for the mediation are not recoverable and some of the fees incurred for the summary judgment motion such as review of the tentative ruling and travel to the hearing are excessive. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Determine Prevailing Party And For Award Of Reasonable Attornesy Fees
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Continued To Jul-16-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RICHARD G. PAREJO, AS TRUSTEES, BARBARA J PAREJO, AS TRUSTEES MOTION FOR ORDER TO DETERMINE PREVAILING PARTY AND FOR AWARD OF REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued on the court's own motion to July 16, 2012. Defendants may file and serve a supplemental brief limited to addressing the additional evidence filed with Plaintiffs' reply papers. Defendants' supplemental brief shall be filed and served no later than July 10, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Courtesy copies are to be provided to Department 302 the day of filing. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

Mtn For Order To Determine Prevailing Party And For Award Of Reasonable Atty'S Fees (Amended)
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS RICHARD G. PAREJO, AS TRUSTEE, BARBARA J PAREJO, AS TRUSTEE'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO DETERMINE PREVAILING PARTY AND FOR AWARD OF REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Determine Prevailing Party And For Award Of Reasonable Attornesy Fees
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Continued To Jul-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHARLES MATTHEW THOMPSON APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JESSICA L. CHYLIK, TEL. NO. 863-5718 X 103 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS CLARIFIED BY BOTH COUNSELS. PLAINTIFFS RICHARD G. PAREJO AND BARBARA PAREJO AS TRUSTEES OF THE PAREJO FAMILY LIVING TRUST'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION SHOULD BE FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT SINCE THERE ARE ONLY 2 CAUSES OF ACTION WHICH WERE RESOLVED. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS Granted. Plaintiffs satisfied their burden of production that defendants breached promissory note and bonus agreement Defendants failed to present evidence showing a triable issue. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =302/HK
